name: Chocolate Chess Bars
recipeIngredient: 1 package Devil's food cake mix (18 oz)
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350°F. Coat a 13-by-9-inch pan with cooking spray.
In a large mixing bowl, combine the cake mix, egg, melted margarine, and water. Beat by hand until well-blended. Pat the mixture into the bottom of the pan.
In another mixing bowl, beat the cream cheese, powdered sugar, and egg whites until the mixture is smooth and creamy. Add vanilla. Pour the mixture over the batter in the pan.
Bake for 45 minutes or until the top is golden brown. Let cool; cut into squares. Garnish with raspberries. Yield: 48 squares.
